Defendants Macy'S And Jan Noll'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Lift Stay, Dismiss Pltff'S F. Reyes'S Class & Representative Claims From Complaint & Enforce Arbitration
Off Calendar Jul-24-2012 Denied
MINI MINUTES: (405/CWoolard/(07-24-12)) Clerk: J.Wong Reporter: Laura Fowler, CSR# 7054.

Robin Workman for the Plaintiff. David Bradshaw for the Defendant. Court informs counsel of its' tentative statement of decision wherein Court is inclined to Deny Defendant's motion pursuant to CCP 1008, 1008(a), 1008(b) and 1008(c).
Based upon the pleadings filed and argument and submission, Court finds no compelling authorization for reconsideration and that one-way intervention is not allowable per PAGA. Court confirms it's tentative ruling and Deny's Defendant's motion as improper per CCP 1008. Ms. Workman to prepare order.

AND JAN NOLL'S Motion To Lift Stay, Dismiss Plaintiff Felicia Reyes' Class And Representative Claims From Complaint And Enforce Arbitration Agreement In Full.
